SageTVPlugin.Name: PWA MiniClient
SageTVPlugin.Description:
A Progressive Web App (PWA) MiniClient for SageTV.
Access your SageTV server from any device with a modern web browser — phones, tablets, laptops, or smart TVs. No app install required; simply open the URL.
The plugin installs an embedded Jetty web server that bridges browser WebSocket connections to the SageTV MiniClient TCP protocol, serving the PWA interface and relaying graphics commands, input events, and media streams in real time.
Features: - Full SageTV UI rendered in-browser via HTML5 Canvas - Media playback with transcoding support (requires ffmpeg) - PWA install-to-home-screen for native app experience - Configurable bridge port and web root path - Navigation drawer with volume controls - Touch and keyboard input support
After install, open http://{SageTV-IP}:8099 in your browser to connect.
SageTVPlugin.Author: galeforcesage
SageTVPlugin.ReleaseNotes: Version 1.0.0.1 - Fix bandwidth display: track actual media stream rate instead of WebSocket protocol data - Status bar now shows sustained transcoding bitrate matching Placeshifter behavior - GPU hardware acceleration support (nvenc/qsv/vaapi/videotoolbox/auto) - Placeshifter-style blue status bar with 15-bar buffer gauge
